## Describe the Bug
A clear and simple description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `...`
2. Call `fakedata.data.users(...)` with options `...`
3. See error / wrong output

## Expected Behavior
What did you expect to happen?

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened? Include the full error message if there is one.

```
Paste error output here
```

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|:---|:---|
| Package Version | e.g. `2.0.2` |
| Language | Python / Node.js / TypeScript |

## Additional Context
Any other information that might help (screenshots, sample code, etc.).
